name: SDLC Lite Live Test Cycle
description: Test-owned lighter SDLC playbook with a single release approval gate.
outcome: Shipped small repository change with design, review, and release approval.

definition.process_instructions: The live-test architect produces a short design in the repository before implementation. The live-test developer implements the change and tests it. The live-test reviewer reviews every developer-delivered change and sends rework back when needed. The live-test architect writes the release summary and waits for the release approval gate. Persist substantive output to the repository, not only handoffs. When a checkpoint deliverable is accepted and the next checkpoint begins, complete the finished checkpoint work item instead of leaving it open.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this lightweight SDLC workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: In Review
columns.description: Primary work is complete and under review.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: design
stages.goal: A lightweight design exists for the small change

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: Working code and tests are ready for review

stages.name: review
stages.goal: Reviewer verdict exists for the delivered change

stages.name: release
stages.goal: Release summary is ready and approved

checkpoints.name: design
checkpoints.goal: A concise design exists for the change.
checkpoints.entry_criteria: The workflow goal is clear enough to shape the implementation.

checkpoints.name: implementation
checkpoints.goal: Working code exists and is ready for review.

checkpoints.name: review
checkpoints.goal: A reviewer verdict exists for the developer-delivered change.
checkpoints.entry_criteria: Implementation output and developer handoff are available.

checkpoints.name: release
checkpoints.goal: Release notes and rollout summary are approved.
